timestamps.text: From the streets of Europe to the arenas of Asia, basketball is everywhere. And nothing represents its passion like the FIBA Basketball World Cup.
Since 1930, the game's greatness has starred in basketball's definitive global competition.
Here, FIBA looks back through the tournament's rich history.
